reviews.title: ⭐ Bazaar Reviews
reviews.loadError: We couldn't load the reviews — try refreshing the page
reviews.emptySubtitle: Be the first to share your experience with this bazaar
reviews.loginPrompt: Log in to add your review →
reviews.notYetOpenMsg: Reviews open up a few hours after the bazaar ends
reviews.alreadyReviewedNote: You've already reviewed this bazaar with {{rating}} ⭐ — submitting a new review will replace it.
reviews.formTitle: ⭐ Rate your experience at this bazaar
reviews.loginRequired: You need to log in first
reviews.saveSuccess: Your review has been saved — thanks for sharing!
reviews.reportedMsg: 🚩 This comment has been reported — under review by our team

errors.already_under_review: This comment is already under review.
errors.bazaar_not_completed: Reviews aren't open yet — the bazaar has to end first.
errors.cannot_review_own_bazaar: You can't review your own bazaar.
errors.comment_too_long: Your comment is too long — 500 characters max.
errors.comment_contains_promo_link: Comments can't include links or social media handles.
errors.comment_looks_like_spam: This comment looks off (excessive repeated characters) — please rephrase it.
errors.comment_contains_banned_word: Your comment contains inappropriate language — please rephrase it.
errors.comment_duplicate_content: You posted the same comment on another bazaar recently — please write about your experience at this one.
errors.review_removed_by_admin: This review was removed by our team and can no longer be edited.

slotMap.title: 🗺️ Slot Map
slotMap.liveBanner: 🔴 Bookings are closed — the bazaar is happening now.

legendTooltip.available: This spot is available and can be booked directly.
legendTooltip.pending: A booking request has been submitted for this spot and is currently under review by the Makani Spot team. The spot remains temporarily reserved.
legendTooltip.booked: A booking request has been submitted for this spot and has been reviewed and confirmed by the Makani Spot team.
legendTooltip.selected: This is the spot you have currently selected to complete your booking.
legendTooltip.featured: This spot is located in a prime area inside the bazaar, featuring higher visibility and foot traffic.
legendTooltip.shareable: This spot allows booking half or all of the space, enabling two exhibitors to share the same spot and split the participation cost.
legendTooltip.half_booked: This spot is shareable and another exhibitor has already booked half. You can book the remaining half at half price to share it.

slotMap.clickHint: Tap any available spot to select it and complete your booking
slotMap.sharedTooltip: 🤝 Sharing available — book at half price
slotMap.sharedHelpText: 🤝 Some spots in this bazaar can be shared between two exhibitors, each paying only half the price. Tap any spot marked 🤝 to choose: book it fully, or book just half and share it with another exhibitor.
slotMap.endedTitle: This bazaar has ended, so booking is no longer available
slotMap.endedDesc: You can still check out the links and content the organizer shared for this event, or follow their accounts.
slotMap.realtimeSlotTaken: ⚠️ The spot you picked was just booked — please choose another
slotMap.fallbackTitle: The slot map isn't available right now
slotMap.fallbackDesc: Message us directly on WhatsApp to check remaining spots and complete your booking

booking.title: Confirm Your Spot
booking.selectPrompt: Choose a spot from the map above
booking.businessPlaceholder: e.g. Um Samira's Kunafa Cart, Nour Jewelry…
booking.notesPlaceholder: Any extra details you'd like to add…
booking.escrowTitle: Your deposit is protected by the Makani Spot guarantee
booking.escrowItem1: You pay the deposit to Makani — not the organizer
booking.escrowItem2: If the bazaar goes ahead → the funds are released to the organizer
booking.escrowItem3: If it's postponed or cancelled → you get a full refund
booking.disclaimer: This reserves your spot provisionally — our team will follow up to confirm the booking and collect the deposit
booking.halfRiskNotice: This booking is for half a booth. If the booking isn't completed before the event, our team will contact you about the available options.

shareChoice.title: This spot can be shared 🤝
shareChoice.helpText: You can book this spot in full, or share it with another exhibitor by booking just half at half the price.
shareChoice.alreadyBookedThisSlot: You already have a booking on this spot — you can't book the second half with the same account
shareChoice.successBody: Thanks {{name}}! We'll let you know once the other half is booked or if there's any update.

validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid mobile number (at least 10 digits)
validation.businessRequired: Please enter your business or brand name
validation.bookingLimitExceeded: You can't book more than two spots at this bazaar with the same account
validation.slotTaken: This spot was just booked — please choose another
validation.genericError: There was a problem with your booking — check your connection and try again
validation.slotUnavailable: We couldn't reserve that spot — someone else may have just booked it

success.title: Booking Request Sent! ⏳
success.body:
Thanks, {{name}}!
We've received your request for {{bazaarName}}.
Your request is now under review — the organizer will reach out at {{phone}} to confirm your booking.
success.pendingNote: ⏳ This is a provisional booking — it isn't confirmed until the organizer reaches out and finalizes payment details.

postponeAlert.title: Postponed Bazaars — Response Needed
postponeAlert.expiredNote: The response deadline has passed — please contact the organizer directly
postponeAlert.acceptedMsg: ✅ Postponement accepted — your booking is confirmed for the new date

errors.not_pending_response: This booking isn't awaiting a response

changeTypes.unreserve_slot: An internal slot reservation was released

proposalModal.notesPlaceholder: Any extra details for the space owner…
proposalModal.successBody: The space owner will reach out on your number if they choose your proposal.

abuseReport.title: 🚩 Report an Issue
abuseReport.disclaimer: Your report will be reviewed by our team. After 3 separate reports, the bazaar is automatically placed under review.

reasons.fake_event: 🎭 Fake event or one that never happened

abuseReport.reasonRequired: Please choose a reason for your report

guard.notOrganizerDesc: You can't access the bazaar management dashboard because your account isn't registered as a bazaar organizer. You can apply now, and once approved you'll be able to create and manage your own bazaars.

card.docsCta: 🎉 This bazaar has ended — add documentation links now ←

overview.actionNeedsLinksDesc: Add event links so they show on your profile and build trust with customers.

docsBanner.title: Congrats on wrapping up your bazaar!
docsBanner.desc: You can add links related to the event to show on your profile and build trust with customers.
docsBanner.deadlineDays_one: You have 1 day left to add links before this reminder disappears for visitors.
docsBanner.deadlineDays_other: You have {{count}} days left to add links before this reminder disappears for visitors.
docsBanner.deadlineExpired: This reminder window has closed — you can still add links anytime.

docsEndedAlert.title: This bazaar ended without documentation
docsEndedAlert.desc: Adding event links (videos, photos, coverage) builds credibility with exhibitors for your future bazaars

lockBanner.infoDesc: — editing is restricted within 24 hours of the start time
lockBanner.infoBody:
You can no longer change the name, dates, location, or working hours.
Only the description and photos can still be edited.
lockBanner.slotsDesc: — spots can't be edited within 24 hours of the start time
lockBanner.slotsBody:
You can't change the number or type (standard/premium) of spots during this window.
You can still manage internal reservations from the internal-booking tab.
lockBanner.editTitleHint: Only the description and photos can be edited right now

info.descPlaceholder: A short description of the bazaar…
info.completedNoticeCancelled: This bazaar was cancelled — info can no longer be edited.
info.completedNoticeEnded: This bazaar has ended — info can no longer be edited. You can still add documentation links from the 🔗 Documentation tab.
info.saveBtnLockedTitle: Only the description and photos can currently be edited
info.amenitiesHint: Select the facilities each exhibitor gets with their spot (optional)

info.photographyDesc: — the bazaar will be professionally photographed/filmed

info.paidAdsDesc: — paid ad campaigns will run to promote the bazaar

validation.datesInvalid: The start date must be before the end date

slots.hintDefault: The total can't go below your actual bookings

errors.below_booked_count: You can't go below your actual bookings — {{count}} spots are booked (minimum: {{min}})

errors.premium_toggle_notfound: Couldn't update the spot — reopen the bazaar and try again

statusTab.pauseDesc: Temporarily pause bookings without cancelling the bazaar. Useful while reviewing contracts or confirming the venue.
statusTab.postponeWarnDesc: Everyone with an active booking will be notified of the postponement and given 48 hours to respond (accept or cancel).
statusTab.postponeDisabledAfterSuccess: This bazaar has been postponed — it can't be postponed again until reactivated
statusTab.postponeLimitReached: ⛔ You've reached the postponement limit ({{max}} times) — you can only cancel this bazaar now
statusTab.postponeAlreadyStarted: ⛔ This bazaar already started on {{date}} — postponing isn't allowed
statusTab.postponeNotAllowedCancelled: This bazaar is cancelled — it can't be postponed
statusTab.postponeNotAllowedClosed: This bazaar is closed — it can't be postponed
statusTab.postponeNotAllowedLiveCompleted: This bazaar is underway or has ended — postponing isn't allowed
statusTab.postponeNotAllowedGeneric: The current status doesn't allow postponing
statusTab.cancelNotAllowed: The current status doesn't allow cancelling
statusTab.cancelWarnWithBookings_one: This will cancel the bazaar and notify 1 booking holder. This can't be undone.
statusTab.cancelWarnWithBookings_other: This will cancel the bazaar and notify {{count}} booking holders. This can't be undone.
statusTab.cancelWarnNoBookings: This will cancel the bazaar. There are no active bookings right now.
statusTab.cancelDisabledAfterSuccess: This bazaar is cancelled — no further action can be taken

docs.linksHint: Add links that show proof of the event — Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, or X posts. They'll appear on your profile so customers can see your track record.

Delete all documentation links?

This will be logged as the organizer removing the links, and the bazaar will show as undocumented.
docs.deletedAllSuccess: 🗑 All links removed — this will be logged as the organizer removing them

bookings.emptyDesc: No spots have been booked for this bazaar yet

hero.title: Organize Your Bazaar With Us
hero.sub: Submit your bazaar request and the Makani Spot team will review it within 48 hours — verified organizers only

guard.loginTitle: You Need to Log In First
guard.loginDesc: This page is for verified organizers only. Log in to continue.
guard.verifiedOnlyDesc: Your account needs to be verified as a bazaar organizer on Makani Spot before you can submit a request. Apply for verification first.

draft.restored: A previous draft was restored {{age}} — you can pick up right where you left off

step1.socialHint: Add at least one social media link — it's shown to exhibitors interested in participating and saved to your profile automatically
step1.socialRequired:
Please add at least one social media link
(Facebook, Instagram, or TikTok)
step1.facebookInvalid: Invalid Facebook link — it must start with https://
step1.instagramInvalid: Invalid Instagram link — it must start with https://
step1.tiktokInvalid: Invalid TikTok link — it must start with https://

step2.mapsHint: Share the location pin link to help exhibitors find their way
step2.descPlaceholder: Write a short description of the event and what makes it special…
step2.mediaHint: Helps exhibitors picture the event — photos are optional but make the bazaar more appealing
step2.coverBoxHint: Click to choose a cover photo
step2.coverHint: The main image shown on the bazaar's card and detail page — a 16:9 or horizontal rectangle works best
step2.extraHint: More photos of the venue or from your past bazaars (optional)
step2.sketchHint: Sketch the spot layout and numbering (Paint, Canva…) then upload it — it helps exhibitors know exactly where they'll be.
step2.amenitiesHint: Select the facilities each exhibitor gets with their spot — shown clearly on the bazaar page before booking (optional)
step2.adBudgetHint: Shown to exhibitors as a tier (Limited / Moderate / Solid / Substantial) without revealing the exact figure
step2.endBeforeStart: The end date must be after the start date
step2.startInPast: The start date must be in the future

upload.fileTypeError: Unsupported file type — only JPG, PNG, and WEBP are allowed
upload.fileSizeError: Image is too large ({{mb}} MB) — the maximum is 8 MB
upload.loginRequired: You need to be logged in to upload a photo
upload.serviceNotLoaded: The upload service hasn't loaded — refresh the page and try again
upload.sessionExpired: Your session has expired — please log in again

step3.dep1Hint: The amount required to confirm a booking
step3.dep2Hint: The remaining amount due before the event
step3.contractPlaceholder: The total value of the venue rental contract
step3.contractHint: For internal use only — not shown to exhibitors
step3.premiumToggleLabel: ⭐ Are there premium spots at a higher price?
step3.premiumInfoText:
Premium spots appear in a different color on the bazaar map with a ⭐ marker and a higher price than regular spots.
For example: front-row spots or larger spaces.
step3.premiumSlotsHint: Must be fewer than the total number of spots
step3.premiumPriceHint: This price is shown to exhibitors when they choose a premium spot
step3.slotsRequired: Please enter the number of spots (at least 1)
step3.premiumSlotsRequired: Please enter the number of premium spots (at least 1)
step3.premiumSlotsMustBeLess: The number of premium spots ({{premium}}) must be fewer than the total number of spots ({{total}})
step3.premiumPriceRequired: Please enter the premium spot price
step3.premiumPriceMustBeHigher: The premium spot price ({{premium}}) must be higher than the regular spot price ({{regular}})
step3.sharedToggleLabel: 🤝 Allow two exhibitors to share the same spot
step3.sharedInfoText: When enabled, two exhibitors can share the same spot and split the subscription cost between them (each pays half the price). Shared spots are marked with a 🤝 on the bazaar map.
step3.sharedSlotsHint: Must be less than or equal to the number of regular spots
step3.sharedSlotsRequired: Please enter the number of shareable spots (at least 1)
step3.sharedSlotsMustBeLess: The number of shareable spots ({{shared}}) must not exceed the number of regular spots ({{regular}})

step4.phoneHint: Used by the Makani team to reach you — never shown publicly
step4.notesPlaceholder: Any details you'd like to share with the team…
step4.credTitle: Reminder: Documentation Links After the Bazaar
step4.credDesc:
After this bazaar ends, you'll be able to add documentation links (videos, photos, coverage) directly from the bazaar's management page.
These links build credibility with exhibitors for your future bazaars ✦
step4.consentText: I agree to show my profile statistics (number of bazaars, ratings) to exhibitors interested in joining this bazaar, and I confirm that all entered information is accurate.
step4.consentRequired: Please agree to the public statistics terms
step4.successDesc: The Makani Spot team will review your request within 48 hours and reach out to you at {{phone}}. You can track your request status from your profile.
step4.errorSchemaCache: Couldn't match the form fields — please refresh the page and try again.

editModal.title: ✍️ Edit Profile
editModal.photoHint: Tap any photo to change it · compressed and uploaded securely
editModal.bioPlaceholder: e.g. Bazaar organizer specializing in commercial events in Cairo…
editModal.securityHint: Leave blank if you don't want to change it

loginWall.title: Log In First
loginWall.desc: You need a Makani Spot account to view your profile.

profile.noPublicProfile: This account doesn't have a public profile

completion.lowMsg: Complete your profile to attract more exhibitors and work with major malls
completion.midMsg: You're on the right track — one more step to become a real brand
completion.highMsg: Your profile is strong! Add the remaining details to fully stand out

cta.becomeOrganizerDesc: Organize your bazaars and host exhibitors — join from the dashboard
cta.becomeOwnerDesc: List your space for rent and start receiving bookings

myBazaarsSection.title: 🎪 My Bazaars ({{count}})
myBazaarsSection.emptyTitle: You haven't organized a bazaar yet

rateSection.title: ⭐ Rate Your Bazaar Participants
rateSection.intro: Rate exhibitors who actually booked or took part in your bazaars. Your rating builds their reputation on the platform and helps other organizers and space owners recognize serious dealers. Rating is only available for exhibitors with a real booking with you — no rating without an actual transaction.
rateSection.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Punctual exhibitor, kept their spot tidy, treated visitors well…
rateSection.emptyTitle: No participants available to rate yet
rateSection.emptyDesc: Once exhibitors book spots in your bazaars, their names will appear here for you to rate.
rateSection.rateOneErr: Rate at least one criterion with stars.

errors.not_authorized_booking: You can't rate this booking — it's not part of your bazaars.
errors.no_registered_user: This booking isn't linked to a registered user account.
errors.participant_not_registered: This participant doesn't have a platform account — they can't be rated.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired — please log in again.

publicSections.reliabilityWarningDesc: This organizer cancelled a bazaar within the last 60 days — be sure to reach out before booking

docsShowcase.title: 📎 Documentation Links
docsShowcase.subtitle: The most recent events this organizer has documented
docsShowcase.footnote: Only the latest 5 documented bazaars are shown here

badges.organizerDescUnverified: Organized a bazaar on the platform
badges.spaceOwnerDesc: Lists spaces for rent on the platform

reputation.sectionDesc: Ratings this account received from space owners and bazaar organizers after real transactions on the platform.

errors.passwordChangeErr: Info saved, but the password change failed: {{msg}}

share.myProfileText: Check out my bazaar organizer profile on Makani Spot
share.publicProfileText: Check out {{name}}'s profile on Makani Spot

hero.title: Request Organizer Verification
hero.sub: Complete your info and we'll review your request within 48 hours — once verified, a ✓ badge appears on all your bazaars

loginWall.title: Log In First
loginWall.desc: You need a Makani Spot account to submit an organizer verification request.

success.title: Your Request Was Submitted Successfully!
success.desc: Thanks for your interest in verification. We'll review your info and reach out within 48 hours via the WhatsApp number you entered.

alreadySubmitted.pendingDesc: You've already submitted a verification request and it's currently under review by the Makani team. We'll reach out within 48 hours.
alreadySubmitted.approvedDesc: Your account is already verified — the ✓ badge shows on all your bazaars.
alreadySubmitted.rejectedDesc: Your previous request couldn't be approved. You can submit a new request with correct information.

section2.title: 🪪 Section 2 — Proof of Identity
section2.tradeRegPlaceholder: If you have a commercial registration, enter its number here

section3.title: 🎪 Section 3 — Prior Experience
section3.expNo: No, this is my first time
section3.countLabel: How many bazaars have you organized?
section3.locationsPlaceholder: e.g. Mall of Egypt, City Stars
section3.latestDescLabel: Brief description of your most recent bazaar
section3.latestDescPlaceholder: e.g. Organized a Summer 2024 bazaar at Mall of Egypt — 20 vendors over 3 days…

section4.title: ✅ Section 4 — Terms Agreement
section4.termsText: I agree to Makani Spot's Terms for Organizers and commit to complying with them across all bazaars listed on the platform
section4.escrowText: I understand and agree that the deposit is held in escrow by Makani Spot until the event takes place, and is only released to me after confirmation

verification.reviewNote: Your request will be manually reviewed by the Makani Spot team within 48 hours

errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid mobile number

errors.backRequired: Please upload the back photo of your ID
errors.termsRequired: You must agree to the terms of use
